from pathlib import Path
p = Path('predict.py')
s = p.read_text()
old = 'if getattr(env, "carrying", None) is not None and target_type != "key":'
new = 'if getattr(getattr(env, "unwrapped", env), "carrying", None) is not None and target_type != "key":'
count = s.count(old)
if count == 0:
    print('carrying wrapper check pattern not found')
else:
    s = s.replace(old, new)
    p.write_text(s)
    print(f'patched {count} carrying checks to use env.unwrapped')
